CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, scale UInt8, default_value Decimal64(0));
SELECT toDecimal64OrDefault(value, scale, default_value) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT a.value, a.scale, toDecimal64OrDefault(a.value, a.scale) AS result FROM (SELECT value, scale FROM test_table) AS a WHERE a.scale < 10;

SELECT a.value, a.scale, b.default_value, toDecimal64OrDefault(a.value, a.scale, b.default_value) AS result FROM (SELECT value, scale FROM test_table) AS a JOIN (SELECT CAST('-1', 'Decimal64(0)') AS default_value) AS b ON a.scale = 0;
SELECT SUM(toDecimal64OrDefault(value, scale, default_value)) AS total_value FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal64OrDefault(CAST(value AS String), scale, default_value) FROM (SELECT value, scale, default_value FROM test_table) WHERE isNull(default_value) = 0;
